old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.65","title":"Retire secure CoAP long-lived correlations","description":"SecureDatagramChannel must retain OSCORE request IDs for Observe notifications and CON response retransmissions, but current DatagramChannel callbacks provide no local Observe-cancellation or ACK lifecycle signal.
